樹窿再次歡迎大家加入
知道過去大半年，大家既生活都過得好壓抑，好似見到有希望但係又唔知前路候點。有人或者係依大半年同父母嗌大交，同伴侶分手離婚，同朋友斷交，有人晚晚夜歸又或者有家歸不得，有人用到無哂錢。或者你覺得好迷惘好無奈，或者你覺得無岀路。有見及此，開左個谷俾大家入黎吐下苦水，只談現實，不談夢境。希望大家可以舒發下，減減壓，然後大家一齊繼續向前行。

發緊想發未發就發夢都唔好係公海講
保障大家安全


講明先 係歡迎任何人講既
理得你藍定黃 狗定人 貓定兔
我地好希望大家可以有個好始既渠道釋放咁耐以來既情緒
如果大家有朋友仔想入來都無任歡迎咖



同埋記得不指責不質問 任何指責及質問均無助大家發洩情緒

replies.msg:
入 #2 / #21 喎
#1 link 死左

Description

06 October 2019

A river of pro-democracy demonstrators and their umbrellas walk through the streets of Hong Kong Island in protest of China's ever tightening grip on Hong Kong's freedoms.

The leaderless movement coined the famous Bruce Lee phrase 'Be Water' - adopting a highly agile, mobile and fluid form of protesting causing difficulty for Hong Kong's police force to predict their movements.

This picture was taken using a -10 f-stop ND filter - to allow a long exposure in daylight, with tripod and umbrella. I wanted to capture the demonstrations of Hong Kong in a way that really caught the eye. Everyone has seen the pictures of thousands of umbrellas, but I wanted to go further than that.

The 'Be Water' tactics have been incredibly effective and had reached across the world - being copied by protesters both in Catalonia and Lebanon. And a way to present their innovative tactics was to try an innovative day-time long exposure, capturing the embodiment of being water.

1. 如果係香港人影我一樣會推 post 叫投票

2. 佢呢個比賽係 Documentary 類別， Documentary 類比賽從來都係含義>>美感

4. 我覺得好靚 而且佢仿效長時間曝光河流相嘅影法嚟貼翻 Be Water 嘅主題，我覺得好有創意喎。
